description: Existing Express + Prisma app, user minta tambah GET /api/orders endpoint dengan pagination cursor-based, filter by status, dan sorting.
user_message: Add a GET /api/orders endpoint in our Express + Prisma app at services/api. It should support cursor-based pagination (limit + cursor), filter by status (pending|paid|shipped|cancelled), and sort by createdAt desc. Make sure error responses follow our existing error contract and include OpenAPI docs.
notes: Endpoint/API contract scope union from AGENTS.md routing table. Performance triggers because of pagination + index considerations. Security because of input validation.
